name: io.github.tryreelestate/reel-estate-mcp
description: Turn real-estate listing photos into property videos from your AI assistant.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SERVER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Backend origin hosting the /mcp endpoint. Defaults to Reel Estate production (https://api.tryreelestate.com); set to a staging or self-hosted backend to override.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Public OAuth client id (PKCE, no secret). Auto-selected per backend host by default; set only when pointing at a backend on a different Clerk instance.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH_CALLBACK_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Loopback port the browser is redirected to after sign-in. Defaults to 8765.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH_STORE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where OAuth tokens are cached. Defaults to ~/.reel-estate-mcp.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH_SCOPE
environmentVariables.description: Optional OAuth scope override. Omitted by default (negotiated from server metadata).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1/true to block all mutating (non-GET) tool calls.
